nasb.text: When Shechem the son of Hamor the Hivite, the prince of the land, saw her, he took her and lay with her by force.

esv.text: And when Shechem the son of Hamor the Hivite, the prince of the land, saw her, he seized her and lay with her and humiliated her.

cnv.text: 當地的首長，希未人哈抹的兒子示劍，看見她，就拉住她，把她強姦，污辱了她。

ccb.text: 当地首领希未人哈抹的儿子示剑看到她，就抓住她，强行玷污了她。

csbs.text: 那地的族长希未人哈抹的儿子示剑看见她，就抓住她，与她同睡，玷辱了她。
